title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 28.005 - Secretary of state, term of office, term begins, when
text:
28.005.  Secretary of state, term of office, term begins, when. — The secretary of state shall hold office for a term of four years beginning at 12:00 noon on the second Monday in January next after his or her election and until a successor is elected and qualified.
(L. 1987 H.B. 456)
